title: VoiceMOS Challenge 2024 - Speech Quality Assessment
description: Speech quality assessment using Mean Opinion Score (MOS). Annotators rate synthesized or processed speech on naturalness, intelligibility, and overall quality on 1-5 scales (Cooper et al., INTERSPEECH 2024).
